title: Workpack Metadata
description: Machine-readable static metadata for a workpack instance. Introduced in Protocol v6. This file is the stable, version-controlled source of truth for workpack identity, dependencies, and structure. Runtime/mutable state belongs in workpack.state.json.

id.description: Unique workpack identifier. Must match the folder name. Standalone: '<slug>'. Grouped: '<NN>_<group-id>_<slug>' where NN is the two-digit execution phase number.

group.description: Group ID if this workpack belongs to a group. Must match the parent group directory name.

title.description: Human-readable title for display in UIs and reports.

summary.description: Brief description of what this workpack accomplishes (1-3 sentences).

protocol_version.description: Workpack Protocol version this instance conforms to.

workpack_version.description: Semantic version of this workpack instance. Bump when plan/prompts change significantly.

requires_workpack.description: Workpack IDs (folder names) that must be completed before this one can start execution. Defines cross-workpack DAG.

tags.description: Free-form categorization tags for filtering and grouping.

owners.description: Human owners or responsible parties (names, emails, or handles).

repos.description: Repository names this workpack touches. Used for multi-repo awareness.

prompts.description: Machine-readable index of all prompts in this workpack. Mirrors the DAG in 01_plan.md but in a parseable format.

agent_role.description: Short description of the agent's role for this prompt.

estimated_effort.description: Estimated effort. XS <30m, S 30m-2h, M 2h-4h, L 4h-8h, XL >8h.
